description: Assign contact models via fractures. The command only applies to PFC . In order for the contact model specified with the model keyword to use the fracture geometry, the contact model must have the property “dip” corresponding to the fracture dip (and “ddir” corresponding to the fracture dip direction, in 3D). The properties assigned to the fractures with the fracture property command are supplied to the contact model. These properties are fixed, in the sense that they will not be inherited from the contacting pieces or previous contacts, and must be specified by the user directly to change their values. Use the contact-model inheritance logic to specify those contact-model properties not specified in the fractures.

keywords.name: activate
keywords.description: Activate contact model assignment when new contacts that intersect a fracture in the specified range are created.

keywords.name: deactivate
keywords.description: Deactivate contact model assignment when new contacts that intersect a fracture in the specified range are created. This applies to all previously activated instances, regardless of the supplied range.

keywords.name: distance
keywords.description: The distance from the closest point on a fracture to the contact line within which to identify contacts for contact model assignment is set to f . The default value is 0.0. The fracture apertures supersede f if the use-aperture keyword is specified.

keywords.name: install
keywords.description: Install the specified contact model at all existing contacts that intersect a fracture in the range. New contacts that intersect fractures will not be automatically assigned the specified contact model unless the activate keyword is also specified.

keywords.name: model
keywords.description: Name the contact model to be used (e.g., linear, smoothjoint, etc.).

keywords.name: use-aperture
keywords.description: Use the aperture of each fracture as the distance criteria to identify the contacts for contact model assignment. The apertures supersede the distance provided with the distance keyword.

keywords.name: activate
keywords.description: Activate contact model assignment when new contacts that intersect a fracture in the specified range are created.

keywords.name: apply-groups
keywords.description: Assign fracture groups to contacts. By default b = false. This keyword only applies when installing contact models.

keywords.name: apply-properties
keywords.description: Apply properties to contact models that intersect a fracture in the specified range.

keywords.name: deactivate
keywords.description: Deactivate contact model assignment when new contacts that intersect a fracture in the specified range are created. This applies to all previously activated instances, regardless of the supplied range.

keywords.name: distance

keywords.name: install
keywords.description: Install the specified contact model at all existing contacts that intersect a fracture in the range. New contacts that intersect fractures will not be automatically assigned the specified contact model unless the activate keyword is also specified.

keywords.name: model
keywords.description: Name the contact model to be used (e.g., linear, smoothjoint, etc.).

keywords.name: type
keywords.description: Restrict the installation to contacts of type s .
